HERMÈS Sac de Pansage Groom Bag - Bleu Nuit & Ebene

Product Details:
Colors: Bleu Nuit (Midnight Blue) and Ebene with a signature Hermès Orange removable inner pouch
Dimensions: 38 x 33 x 16.5 cm
Blind Stamp: Y (2020)
Accessories Included: Original Receipt, Removable Inner Pouch

Condition Report:
The bag is in excellent, like-new condition. Partial original protective films are still intact on the hardware. Please examine all photos carefully before placing your order to confirm the immaculate condition.

Style & Fit Notes:
Originally inspired by Hermès' equestrian heritage, this bag is exceptionally practical and versatile. Thanks to its generous capacity and well-organized removable insert, it serves perfectly as a daily commuter tote, chic gym bag, luxury maternity/diaper bag, or a stylish beach bag. A highly functional everyday staple offering incredible value and multiple ways to use.
